purpose: Record the cycle-2 hole bank update required before selecting cycle 3 lanes.

selected_cycle2_lanes.decision: Shiab remains a quarantined candidate; selector identity is scoped missing.
Checked manuscript neighborhoods give adjacent RS context, but no accepted source differential for d_RS,-1.
Manuscript source-native objects are not source-identified with the later D_GU^epsilon 0/1 target.
Manuscript has QFT-adjacent context, but no finite local extraction/projector rule.
Text extraction is adequate for navigation but not for identity-grade receipt work.

promoted_cycle3_candidates.quality_hole: Can rendered/manual formula transcription recover a source-forced IG/Shiab selector or prove the selector remains scoped missing?

promoted_cycle3_candidates.dependency: cycle2 RS source differential gate pages 46-48, 62, and 65
promoted_cycle3_candidates.quality_hole: Can rendered/manual formula transcription recover an RS minus-one map or prove the checked manuscript windows lack it?

promoted_cycle3_candidates.dependency: cycle2 DGU01 identity gate pages 43-48 and 55-58
promoted_cycle3_candidates.quality_hole: Can rendered/manual formula transcription establish a source identity to D_GU^epsilon 0/1 or keep the principal-symbol gate closed?
Can a non-imported source-facing finite extraction specification be written from manuscript-compatible data, or is QFT receipt work underdefined?

promoted_cycle3_candidates.dependency: cycle1 UCSD exact transcript windows and cycle2 rendered-display requirement
promoted_cycle3_candidates.quality_hole: Can the already-local UCSD transcript windows be turned into a concrete visual/frame capture packet, or is visual source acquisition still the first blocker?

sequential_not_parallel_until_prerequisi.waits_for: at least one accepted_for_routing source receipt candidate
accepted d_RS,-1 source differential plus identity gate

anti_overlap_status.shared_read_source_policy: parallel reads and page renders allowed; each worker writes only its own artifact and audit
